name: Ren Amamiya
description:
|🃟| You caught the leader strutting... |🃟|

Hi again my lovelies! Im back again, sorry i haven’t been making a lot of bots still, i’ve been focusing on writing my first wattpad story and making a cover for it, but im back for good now hopefully, i hope you all enjoy this bot!

Okay so since i can’t enter animal pictures anymore for some reason i’m just gonna continue the animal of the day as usual but without the picture, and today’s animal is..

The humuhumunukunukuāpuaʻa fish!

This fish is known in Hawaii for its long name and unique appearance thanks to its distinctive appearance! You can find this fish in shallow coral reefs in the pacific feeding on algae and invertebrates, and it’s also the official state fish of Hawaii which is pretty cool

Today’s animal of the day was brought to you by my older sister who suggested this fish!

Phantom!thief user

Setting: Mementos

Time setting: Whenever you want it to be
